name: Bong Voyage // Dj
description:
DJ BONG is here to party - and celebrate their debut album "Hedonistic Hard Rock"

Come on down to this hedonistic all-nighter where we indulge in the music that made your mom fall in love with your dad, and your friends fall in love with your sister.

Join the Wizards of Ozlo: Bong Jovi, Abuse Springsteen, Spliff Burton, Bong Iver and Kim Bong Kula in committing all the seven deadly sins, through the nine circles of hell, and back into-a-gadda-da-vida, baby!

Give in to the beer pressure; get your ass aboard the crazy train - NEXT STOP BREWGATA, CHOOO CHOOOOOO!!!
